articles.title_en: Within a day, the Russian Armed Forces hit the transport and energy infrastructure used by the Ukrainian Armed Forces
articles.lead_en: Russian troops also hit temporary locations of Ukrainian armed forces and foreign mercenaries in 140 districts
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ за сутки поразили используемую ВСУ транспортную и энергоинфраструктуру

articles.title_en: The principle of defense in depth was called the basis of nuclear safety
articles.lead_en: This was the main result of a revision of the attitude towards protection in nuclear energy after the Chernobyl accident, according to the National Report “Forty years of the Chernobyl accident. Results and prospects for overcoming its consequences in Russia”
articles.title_raw: Основой атомной безопасности назвали принцип глубокоэшелонированной защиты
articles.lead_raw: Это стало главным результатом пересмотра отношения к защите в ядерной энергетике после чернобыльской аварии, говорится в Национальном докладе "Сорок лет чернобыльской аварии. Итоги и перспективы преодоления ее последствий в России"

articles.title_en: In Kuban, the number of houses supplied with gas under the social program will exceed 100 thousand in the summer.
articles.lead_en: The regional authorities are implementing a gasification program on behalf of Russian President Vladimir Putin

articles.title_en: EC: The US assured that it will not extend the lifting of restrictions on transactions with Russian oil
articles.lead_en: The measure was taken due to the fact that several low-income countries find themselves in an extremely difficult situation, noted European Commissioner for Trade Policy and Economic Security Maros Šefčović
